programme.title: Day 1 - Two Phases – 1.40m - CHI AL SHAQAB Presented by Longines 2026
programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Bologna vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

In the main event, welterweight MMA sees Chase Mann face Dzhabir Dzhabrailov. The card also includes Sam-A vs Elmehdi El Jamari in strawweight Muay Thai, plus Dante Leon vs Kenta Iwamoto in welterweight submission grappling.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg

programme.desc: 16-Episode Series offering a cinematic exploration of the "soccer soul" of each FIFA World Cup 2026 host city. Uncover the cultural, grassroots, and community dimensions of football across North America.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends. For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Porto vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Toulouse vs Lille -French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Toulouse have 21 home wins against Lille in Ligue 1, only beating Metz and Rennes more often on home soil in the top-flight. programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Lyon have lost just one of their nine Ligue 1 matches against Lorient when Les Merlus have been newly promoted to the top-flight, which was in the reverse fixture this season ; the only time OL have failed to score in such encounters. Lyon have not won any of their last nine matches in all competitions, after winning each of their previous 13. OL have only gone 10 matches without a win in all competitions on three occasions in their history: October-December 1959, April-September 1962 and June-November 2023.

programme.title: Metz vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
programme.desc: Metz have won their last three matches against Nantes, all in Ligue 1, and have never had a longer winning streak against them in 113 meetings in all competitions. Metz have not lost any of their last seven home games against Nantes in Ligue 1, their longest current unbeaten run at home against a top-flight team.

programme.title: Monaco vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
programme.desc: Since their return to Ligue 1 in 2013-14, Monaco have scored 50 goals against Marseille in the top-flight, their second-highest total behind Nantes. OM have only conceded more goals against Paris SG in L1 during this period. Having lost the reverse fixture, Monaco have not lost both of their Ligue 1 matches against Marseille in a single season since 2007-08.

programme.title: Ligue 1: Iconic Players Best of Blanc , Ibrahimovic and Niang in Ligue 1
programme.desc: Ligue 1 Legends, program talks about the main achievements and numbers of three legends played in French league. Laurent Blanc , Zlatan Ibrahimovic and Mamadou Niang.

programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
programme.desc: Paris Saint-Germain have kept 12 clean sheets against Toulouse in Ligue 1 during the QSI era, only doing better against Marseille. Paris Saint-Germain could record their 700th clean sheet in Ligue 1, becoming the eighth team to reach this tally in the history of the competition. Paris Saint-Germain also have the highest ratio of clean sheets in the top-flight.

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. programme.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco and Lille picking up more points than SRFC over the period. programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29

programme.title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

programme.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
programme.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. programme.title: Day 7 - ATP 1000 Rolex Monte - Carlo Masters
programme.desc: Held from 5–12 April at the Monte-Carlo Country Club, the event marks the opening of the European clay season. Featuring a 56-player singles draw on outdoor clay, it brings together top-ranked players competing in best-of-three-set matches as they build form ahead of Roland Garros.

programme.title: Roman Andres Burruchaga (ARG) vs Tommy Paul (USA) - Day 7 - ATP 250 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men’s C
programme.desc: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. The conditions favor big servers and first-strike tennis, making it a unique transition event into the clay-court season.

programme.title: Final - Day 8 - ATP 1000 Rolex Monte - Carlo Masters
programme.desc: Held from 5–12 April at the Monte-Carlo Country Club, the event marks the opening of the European clay season. Featuring a 56-player singles draw on outdoor clay, it brings together top-ranked players competing in best-of-three-set matches as they build form ahead of Roland Garros.

programme.title: Mariano Navone (ARG) vs Daniel Merida (ESP) - Final - ATP 250 - Tiriac Open, Bucharest Romania - 202
programme.desc: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

programme.desc: The World Athletics Indoor Championships bring together the world’s leading male and female athletes, representing over 100 nations, including Olympic and world medalists. programme.title: Al Ahli vs Al Duhail - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W21
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Chartres vs Toulouse - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Tours vs Paris - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Nîmes vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Jawla - Live Studio

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Bolívar (BOL) vs Deportivo La Guaira (VEN) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: L.D.U. Quito (ECU) vs Mirassol (BRA) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
